source: docs/csa_vs_erp_comparison.json — filtered for Indonesian textile SME relevance

features.title: UOM Conversion System (1.11, 2.8)
acceptance_criteria: New Prisma model `UomConversion` with fields: fromUnitId, toUnitId, factor (Decimal)
Migration applied successfully with `npx prisma db push`
Server action `getUomConversions()` and `createUomConversion()` in lib/actions/master-data.ts
Product form shows secondary UOM field with conversion factor when product has multiple UOMs
Conversion logic helper `convertUom(qty, fromUnit, toUnit)` in lib/inventory-utils.ts
All existing tests pass, no new TypeScript errors
features.notes: Textile uses meters, yards, kg, rolls — conversion is critical. Model: UomConversion { id, fromUnitId, toUnitId, factor }. Example: 1 yard = 0.9144 meter. Add relations to Unit model.

features.title: Opening Balances — GL & Bank Accounts (5.10, 5.11)
acceptance_criteria: New page /finance/opening-balances with form to enter opening GL balances
Form shows all GLAccounts grouped by type (Asset, Liability, Equity, Revenue, Expense)
Each account row has editable Debit and Credit fields
Submit creates a JournalEntry with description 'Saldo Awal' and date = fiscal year start
Total Debits must equal Total Credits before submission (balanced check)
Success toast + redirect to /finance/chart-accounts
Sidebar link added under Keuangan section
All existing tests pass, no new TypeScript errors
features.notes: Essential for go-live. Users need to enter their existing balances when starting the ERP. Use existing JournalEntry model with a special reference like 'OPENING-BALANCE-2026'.

features.title: Opening Balances — AP & AR (5.8, 5.9)
acceptance_criteria: Opening AP section: form to create opening vendor bills (Invoice type INV_IN, status ISSUED)
Opening AR section: form to create opening customer invoices (Invoice type INV_OUT, status ISSUED)
Each row: select customer/vendor, invoice number, amount, due date
Bulk creation — user can add multiple rows and submit all at once
Created invoices appear in /finance/payables and /finance/receivables
Page accessible from /finance/opening-balances (same page as CSA-002, new tab)
All existing tests pass, no new TypeScript errors
features.notes: Part of the opening balances page. Add as tabs: 'Saldo GL' and 'Saldo AP/AR'. Reuse existing Invoice model.

features.title: Opening Stock Quantities (2.14, 2.15)
acceptance_criteria: New page or section in /inventory for entering opening stock quantities
Form: select product, select warehouse, enter quantity, enter unit cost
Bulk entry — multiple products at once
Submit creates InventoryTransaction with type INITIAL for each product/warehouse
Updates StockLevel records accordingly
Also creates GL journal entry: DR Inventory Asset, CR Opening Balance Equity
All existing tests pass, no new TypeScript errors
features.notes: Uses existing TransactionType.INITIAL. Need a form to make it easy to enter bulk opening stock. Add link to inventory sidebar.

features.title: Costing Method Configuration (10.10)
acceptance_criteria: New field `costingMethod` on Product model (enum: AVERAGE, FIFO) with default AVERAGE
Settings page or product form shows costing method selector
Average cost calculation: weighted average on each receipt (PO receive, production in)
FIFO tracking: new model `CostLayer` with qty, unitCost, remainingQty for FIFO products
Cost calculation used in: inventory valuation report, COGS calculation, PnL report
Migration applied, all existing tests pass
features.notes: Most textile SMEs use average costing. FIFO is optional but good to have. Start with average as default. CostLayer model: { id, productId, warehouseId, qty, unitCost, remainingQty, createdAt }.

features.title: Negative Stock Policy (10.9)
acceptance_criteria: New system setting `allowNegativeStock` (boolean, default false)
When false: stock transactions that would make quantity < 0 are rejected with error message
When true: stock can go negative (useful for pre-selling fabric)
Check enforced in: SO shipment, stock adjustment, production material issue, manual transfer
Setting accessible from /settings or /inventory settings section
Clear error message in Bahasa: 'Stok tidak cukup. Sisa stok: X unit'
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Add to a settings table or use a simple key-value config. Check at InventoryTransaction creation time.

features.title: Direct Purchase / Pembelian Langsung (9.4)
acceptance_criteria: New 'Pembelian Langsung' button on /procurement or /inventory page
Dialog: select vendor, add items (product, qty, unit price), set warehouse
Submit creates PO (status COMPLETED), GRN (auto-received), and vendor bill (DRAFT) in one action
Stock levels updated immediately
GL entry: DR Inventory, CR Accounts Payable
Transaction appears in stock movements and journal
All existing tests pass, no new TypeScript errors
features.notes: Shortcut for walk-in purchases. Skip the PR->PO->GRN workflow. Create PO+GRN+Bill atomically.

features.title: Purchase Return Workflow (9.3, 9.5, 9.7)
acceptance_criteria: New 'Retur Pembelian' button on /procurement/orders or /finance/payables
Dialog: select original PO or bill, select items to return, enter qty and reason
Creates InventoryTransaction type RETURN_OUT (stock decreases)
Creates DebitCreditNote type DEBIT linked to the original bill
GL entry: DR Accounts Payable, CR Inventory
Returned quantity reflected in PO and bill balances
All existing tests pass
features.notes: TransactionType.RETURN_OUT exists but no UI workflow. DebitCreditNote model exists. Wire them together.

features.title: Sales Return Receipt Workflow (8.2)
acceptance_criteria: New 'Retur Penjualan' button on /sales/orders or /finance/receivables
Dialog: select original SO or invoice, select items to return, enter qty and reason
Creates InventoryTransaction type RETURN_IN (stock increases back)
Creates CreditNote linked to the original invoice
GL entry: DR Sales Returns (contra-revenue), CR Accounts Receivable
Returned quantity reflected in SO and invoice balances
All existing tests pass
features.notes: CreditNote model exists. RETURN_IN transaction type exists. Need to create the workflow UI connecting them.

features.title: Production Return / Retur Produksi (11.4)
acceptance_criteria: New 'Retur Produksi' action on work order detail or /manufacturing/orders
Allows returning finished goods back to raw materials (un-produce)
Creates InventoryTransaction: type PRODUCTION_RETURN for finished goods (decrease)
Creates InventoryTransaction: type MATERIAL_RETURN for raw materials (increase back)
Work order completed quantity adjusted
GL entry reversal: DR Raw Materials, CR WIP/Finished Goods
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Add new TransactionTypes PRODUCTION_RETURN and MATERIAL_RETURN to enum if they don't exist. This is for defective batches that need to be undone.

features.title: HPP/COGS from BOM Formula (11.5)
acceptance_criteria: Function `calculateBOMCost(bomId)` returns total material cost from BOM items
Each BOM item cost = quantity * product.costPrice (or latest purchase price)
Include waste percentage in calculation: effective qty = qty * (1 + waste%/100)
BOM detail page shows calculated cost breakdown per material
Cost summary card: Total Material Cost, Cost per Unit (total / BOM output qty)
Cost feeds into product costPrice field (manual or auto-update option)
All existing tests pass
features.notes: BOM already has items with quantity and waste%. Product has costPrice. Calculate aggregate cost and show on BOM detail page.

features.title: Closing Journal / Jurnal Penutup (12.6)
acceptance_criteria: New 'Jurnal Penutup' action on /finance/journal or /finance/reports page
Dialog: select fiscal year to close, shows preview of closing entries
Closing entries: zero out all Revenue accounts (DR Revenue, CR Income Summary)
Closing entries: zero out all Expense accounts (DR Income Summary, CR Expense)
Transfer net income to Retained Earnings (DR/CR Income Summary to Equity)
All closing entries posted as a single JournalEntry with reference 'CLOSING-YYYY'
Prevents double-closing (check if closing entry already exists for that year)
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Standard year-end closing. Creates journal entries that zero revenue/expense accounts and transfer net income to retained earnings.

features.title: Discount Type & Scheme System (4.1, 4.2)
acceptance_criteria: New Prisma model `DiscountScheme` with: name, type (PERCENTAGE/FIXED/TIERED), rules (JSON)
Tiered rules structure: [{minQty, maxQty, discount}] for quantity-based discounts
Discount can be assigned to: PriceList, Customer, Product, or Category level
Quotation and SO forms show applicable discounts and auto-calculate
Discount line items appear on invoice with breakdown
Admin page to manage discount schemes (CRUD)
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Textile industry uses tiered discounts heavily (buy 100m get 5% off, 500m get 10% off). Model should be flexible for both percentage and fixed discounts.

features.title: AP Payment Expansion — Multi-Bill & Partial (9.8)
acceptance_criteria: Vendor payment page supports paying multiple bills in one payment
Partial payment: pay less than full amount, bill status changes to PARTIAL
Payment allocation: user selects which bills to pay and how much per bill
Running AP balance shown per vendor
Payment creates GL entry: DR Accounts Payable, CR Bank/Cash
Payment history linked to specific bill line items
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Current AP payment is limited. Expand to support multi-bill payment, partial payments, and proper allocation tracking.

features.title: Order Revision / Amendment Tracking (7.9)
acceptance_criteria: Sales Order supports revision: new field `revision` (integer, default 0)
When SO is amended, revision increments and previous version is stored
SO detail page shows revision history with diff (what changed)
Purchase Order supports same revision tracking
Revision requires reason/notes field
Original document number stays the same, revision appended (e.g., SO-001 Rev.2)
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Quotation already has versioning. Extend same pattern to SO and PO. Store revision history as JSON or separate model.

features.title: Exchange Rate Table (5.2, 1.12, 5.1)
acceptance_criteria: New Prisma model `Currency` with: code (USD, EUR, SGD, CNY), name, symbol
New Prisma model `ExchangeRate` with: currencyId, date, buyRate, sellRate, middleRate
Admin page /finance/currencies to manage currencies and rates
Rate entry: manual input per date (no API integration needed)
PO and Invoice forms show currency selector when vendor/customer uses foreign currency
Automatic IDR conversion using latest rate on transaction date
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Indonesian textile imports fabric from China/Korea. USD and CNY exchange rates are essential. Start simple: manual rate entry, auto-conversion on forms.

features.title: Batch Price Update for Products (10.4)
acceptance_criteria: New 'Update Harga Massal' button on /inventory/products page
Dialog shows product list with current sellPrice and costPrice
User can: set new price per product, or apply % increase/decrease to selected products
Preview shows old price vs new price before confirming
Submit updates all selected products in one transaction
Price change history logged (optional: who changed, when, old vs new)
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Textile prices change frequently with raw material costs. Batch update saves time vs editing each product individually.

features.title: Salesperson Master & Commission Tracking (3.4)
acceptance_criteria: New Prisma model `Salesperson` with: code, name, phone, email, commissionRate (Decimal)
Salesperson CRUD page or section in /sales
Sales Order and Quotation forms have salesperson selector
Commission calculation: commissionRate % of SO total amount
Commission report: list salespeople with total sales and commission earned per period
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Textile factories have sales reps with commission. Simple model + assignment to SO + basic reporting.

features.title: Barcode Label Printing (2.19)
acceptance_criteria: Product detail page shows 'Cetak Label' button
Generates printable barcode label using product barcode or SKU field
Label layout: barcode image, product name, SKU, price
Supports printing multiple labels (quantity selector)
Uses browser print dialog (no special printer driver needed)
Barcode format: Code128 or EAN-13
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Product already has barcode field. Generate barcode image client-side using a library like JsBarcode. Print via window.print() with a print-friendly CSS layout.

features.title: Fiscal Period Management (1.14)
acceptance_criteria: New Prisma model `FiscalPeriod` with: year, month, startDate, endDate, isClosed (boolean)
Auto-generate 12 periods for a fiscal year
Closing a period prevents posting journal entries to that period
Period status shown on /finance dashboard or reports page
Admin can reopen a closed period if needed
All existing tests pass
features.notes: Prevents users from accidentally posting to closed months. Simple model + check on JournalEntry creation.
